final:
// // This module subtracts b from a when op is 0, and adds a and b when op is 1.
module top_module(
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    input op,
    output reg [3:0] out
);always @*
begin
    if (op == 0) // addition
        out = a + b;
    else // subtraction
        out = a - b;
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module subtracts b from a when op is 0, and adds a and b when op is 1.
